2: And have not the understanding of a man.
3: Nor have the knowledge of the holy.
5: He is is a shield unto them that put their trust in him.
6: Lest he reprove thee, and thou be found a liar.
7: Deny me them them not before I die:
8: Feed me with food convenient for me:
9: And take the name of my God in vain in vain .
10: Lest he curse thee, and thou be found guilty.
11: And doth not bless their mother.
12: And yet yet is not washed from their filthiness.
13: And their eyelids are lifted up.
14: To devour the poor from off the earth, and the needy from among among men.
16: And the fire that that saith not, It is It is enough.
17: And the young eagles shall eat it.
18: Yea, four which I know not:
19: And the way of a man with a maid.
20: And saith, I have done no wickedness.
21: And for four which which it cannot bear:
22: And a fool when he is filled with meat;
23: And an handmaid that is heir to her mistress.
24: But they are are exceeding wise:
25: Yet they prepare their meat in the summer;
26: Yet make they their houses in the rocks;
27: Yet go they forth all of them by bands;
29: Yea, four are comely in going:
30: And turneth not away for any;
31: And a king, against whom there is there is no rising up.
32: Lay Lay thine hand upon thy mouth.
33: So the forcing of wrath bringeth forth strife.
